---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem in the Hermes Runtime plugin
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the problem.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Runtime identity or metadata
- [ ] Pairing
- [ ] Device trust state
- [ ] Session or resume
- [ ] Agent discovery or dispatch
- [ ] Transfer or artifact handling
- [ ] Dashboard/admin routes
- [ ] README or contributor docs

## Expected Behavior

What should happen?

## Actual Behavior

What happens instead?

## Reproduction

Include the smallest route, event, dashboard action, or local setup that shows
the issue.

## Validation

Paste relevant `make lint` or `make test` output, or explain why validation was
not run.

## Security

Do not include secrets, private keys, Session IDs, Pairing material, Device
trust state, artifact URLs, local operator state, or private deployment URLs. If
this is a security vulnerability, do not submit this issue; follow
`SECURITY.md`.
